title: matricaria maritima subsp. inodora
intro: Matricaria maritima subsp. inodora is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae, commonly known as sea chamomile or wild chamomile. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Matricaria maritima subsp. inodora include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues such as bloating and nausea. Matricaria maritima subsp. inodora can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
